allow: Bash(sed -i 's|<button class=""currency-btn"" data-symbol=""£"" onclick=""setCurrency\(this\)"">£ GBP</button>|<button class=""currency-btn"" data-symbol=""£"" onclick=""setCurrency\(this\)"">£ GBP</button>\\n      <button class=""currency-btn"" data-symbol=""Kč"" onclick=""setCurrency\(this\)"">Kč CZK</button>|g' "$f")
